# Audio fixture attribution

The WAV, AAC, and FLAC fixtures are generated from the 440 Hz tone produced by `generate.ts`.

The MP3 and Vorbis fixtures come from [MDN Web Audio examples](https://github.com/mdn/webaudio-examples) at commit `733def1c41939a7bb2ec4dc1be3603e3ae70af51`. That repository publishes its samples under CC0-1.0.

- `tone.mp3` is `step-sequencer/dtmf.mp3`.
- `tone.ogg` is `voice-change-o-matic/audio/concert-crowd.ogg`.

The Opus fixture is `test/audio.opus` from [libwebm-js](https://github.com/sctg-development/libwebm-js) at commit `684fedee717e48025672c11077e5d6ddc47d9f93`, licensed under BSD-3-Clause.
